event: Still Life with Fruit, Bottles, and Breads
description: A still life painting on a table covered with a white cloth. Arranged on the surface are clusters of green grapes, several golden pears, dark figs, round loaves of bread, what appears to be cheese, and sliced cured meat. Behind the food stand three dark bottles and a small wooden barrel. The background is very dark, concentrating the light on the rich array of provisions. The palette is warm — golds, browns, greens, and the deep dark of glass bottles.

_meta.title: Still life with fruit, bottles, breads
